name: Atlas Aide AGV Agent
description: Executes bounded routine support and chairside evidence collection for a fictional dialysis-center POC; Atlas makes no medical judgment.

skills.name: Routine Item Delivery
skills.description: Deliver a pre-approved water, coffee, or blanket item to a known treatment chair.
examples: Deliver the pre-approved coffee to Chair 1.

skills.name: Chairside Evidence Collection
skills.description: Ask a bounded question or collect simulator-provided vital signs and visible observations without clinical interpretation.
examples: Ask the patient at Chair 3 whether they feel dizzy and report the exact statement.
